_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Document and communicate tradecraft, best practices, TTPs, training, briefings, presentations, papers, studies, lessons learned, etc. to both technical and non-technical audiences.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.617), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.573).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.694). Shared vocabulary: [audiences, non, technical]. DCWF-only terms [best, briefings, communicate, document, etc, learned] vs WIDAI-only terms [briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats, internal] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.905 (P=0.897, R=0.912). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Document and communicate tradecraft, best practices, TTPs, training, briefings," and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.642 < STS 0.694 (gap -0.052). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [best, briefings, communicate] and [briefing, communicating, conference] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [audiences, non, technical]. DCWF-only: [best, briefings, communicate, document, etc, learned]. WIDAI-only: [briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats, internal].
